ham.subject: Scheduled VPN Maintenance – Action Required
ham.body:
Hello Team,

Please be advised that the corporate VPN will undergo routine maintenance on **Tuesday, 12th May 2026 from 10:00 PM to 12:30 AM**. During this window the VPN will be unavailable.

To avoid disruptions:
1. Ensure all critical remote sessions are closed before 9:30 PM.
2. Save any unsynced work locally.
3. If you need to connect after 12:30 AM, please request a temporary access code.

If you have any questions or need assistance, reply to this email or contact the IT Helpdesk at helpdesk@company.com.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Best regards,
IT Operations Team

spam.subject: Urgent: Outstanding Invoice for QuickBooks/Norton – Immediate Action Required
spam.body:
Dear Valued Customer,

We regret to inform you that our records indicate an **outstanding invoice** for your QuickBooks/Norton subscription (Invoice #QBN-2026-054). The payment of ₹45,000 was due on 20th April 2026 and remains unpaid.

If payment is not received within **48 hours**, your account will be **suspended** and you will lose access to all QuickBooks and Norton services. This includes critical financial data and software updates.

To avoid service interruption, please log in to your account and complete the payment by clicking the link below:

<URL>

For any queries, contact our support team at support@quickbooksnorton.com.

Thank you for your immediate attention to this matter.

Sincerely,
QuickBooks/Norton Billing Department
